meta.baseline: unablated distilled student (KL and flips vs itself)
meta.note: all interventions on z = P^T (h - mean_l) inside the bottleneck hooks; forward passes only

A2_per_layer_ablation.note: rows = dims (A1 impact order), cols = layers 0..11

B1_ablation_profiles.metric: spearman corr of per-position KL vectors

B2_activation_profiles.metric: pearson corr of z_i time-series across layers
B2_activation_profiles.caveat: residual stream carries coordinates forward, so high values are partly architectural; B1 is the causal test
